heading: Foreign Affairs Manual and Foreign Affairs Handbook changes
label: 2658a Foreign Affairs Manual and Foreign Affairs Handbook changes
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (c)(1). substituted “8 years” for “5 years”.Pub. L. 119–60
DefinitionsFor definition of “appropriate congressional committees” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 117–81section 263c of this title
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsec. (c)(1). substituted “8 years” for “5 years”.Pub. L. 119–60

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: a Applicability
children.text: The Foreign Affairs Manual and the Foreign Affairs Handbook apply with equal force and effect and without exception to all Department of State personnel, including the Secretary of State, Department employees, and political appointees, regardless of an individual’s status as a Foreign Service officer, Civil Service employee, or political appointee hired under any legal authority.

children.heading: Certification
children.label: b Certification
children.text: Not later than 30 days after , the Secretary of State shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a certification in unclassified form that the applicability described in subsection (a) has been communicated to all Department personnel, including the personnel referred to in such subsection.December 27, 2021

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , and every 180 days thereafter for 8 years, the Secretary shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report detailing all significant changes made to the Foreign Affairs Manual or the Foreign Affairs Handbook.December 27, 2021

children.heading: Covered periods
children.label: 2 Covered periods
children.text: The first report required under paragraph (1) shall cover the 5-year period preceding the submission of such report. Each subsequent report shall cover the 180-day period preceding submission.

children.label: A
children.text: The location within the Foreign Affairs Manual or the Foreign Affairs Handbook where a change has been made.

children.label: B
children.text: The statutory basis for each such change, as applicable.

children.label: C
children.text: A side-by-side comparison of the Foreign Affairs Manual or Foreign Affairs Handbook before and after such change.

children.label: D
children.text: A summary of such changes displayed in spreadsheet form.
